entries.definition:
th–l–l a herd of sheep, wool, a group of people; to perish, to
ruin. Of this root, ثُلَّة thullatun occurs three times in the Qur’an.

ثُلَّة thullatun [n.] a multitude, a group, a crowd (56:12–13) مِنْ
ثُلَّةٌ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَقَلِيلٌ مِنَ الْآخِرِينَ many from the past generation, and a few
from later generations.
entries.definition_english:
th–l–l a herd of sheep, wool, a group of people; to perish, to
ruin. Of this root, ثُلَّة thullatun occurs three times in the Qur’an.

ثُلَّة thullatun [n.] a multitude, a group, a crowd (56:12–13) مِنْ
ثُلَّةٌ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَقَلِيلٌ مِنَ الْآخِرِينَ many from the past generation, and a few
from later generations.
